title: What doctoral programs must change in an AI-saturated research environment
summary_en: Generative AI has moved from novelty to a core tool in a remarkably short period of time. Doctoral students now routinely use AI tools to locate sources, summarize literature, generate outlines, and even draft sections of academic writing.
title_cn: 人工智能高度饱和科研环境下博士培养项目的必要变革

title: The pedagogy gap: Redefining the role of faculty and AI in higher education
summary_en: AI’s rapid integration into the higher-education landscape has prompted a period of profound structural reassessment. For decades, new technology adoption in education has often been driven by a “technology for technology’s sake” mentality–a pursuit of digital innovation that typically prioritizes the novelty of the tool over the efficacy of the intended outcome.
title_cn: 教学法差距：重新定义高等教育中教职人员与人工智能的作用
